summary: First post-MVP test of Jimbo Connect. Backend: 25/26 pytest tests passed (96%). Frontend: all critical flows verified (admin login, event CRUD, user registration, profile page, event directory listing, save contact, search/filter inputs present). No blocking issues.

minor.issue: Returns 404 (trailing slash) via ingress; purely cosmetic, not used by frontend.
Cookies set with secure=False even though site is served over HTTPS. Works today (SameSite=Lax) but should be secure=True + samesite='none' for production-grade security.

ui_bugs.issue: No data-testid on 'Copy contact info' / email button (only Save has data-testid). The envelope icon lacks a clear 'copy-contact-{id}' testid. Main agent should add data-testid and/or clarify if it is copy-to-clipboard or mailto link.
Radix Dialog a11y warnings: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent'. Add DialogDescription.

issues: Minor: globe image appears very small / could use better framing.

action_items: (Optional) Fix GET /api/ to not 404 when hit with trailing slash (FastAPI redirect behavior + ingress).
(Recommended) Set cookies with secure=True and SameSite='none' in production so iOS/Safari strict-mode flows still work.
Add data-testid='copy-contact-{id}' to the copy/email button on attendee cards so automated tests can verify Copy contact info functionality.
Add DialogDescription to admin Create/Edit Event dialogs for a11y.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~700 lines and contains auth, profile, storage, events, contacts, admin — consider splitting into routers (auth.py, events.py, contacts.py) to stay under the 700-line guideline.
CORS config: when CORS_ORIGINS is '*' the code falls back to FRONTEND_URL only — reasonable, but the comment is missing. Fine for now since allow_credentials=True forbids '*'.
Login uses IP+email as brute-force identifier (good). Lockout is 5 fails / 15 min — matches playbook.
Seed admin updates existing admin password if env ADMIN_PASSWORD differs — idempotent seed is correct.
Missing rate limiting on /api/auth/register (brute-force email enumeration).
Missing pagination on /api/events/{id}/attendees (returns up to 1000). Fine for MVP scale.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@jimboconnect.com / admin123 (confirmed working). File /app/memory/test_credentials.md is present and auto-written by the backend on startup.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 test event 'TEST_Event_Networking' via admin and 2+ TEST_user accounts through backend tests and UI registration. These remain in DB for next-iteration testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully functional. JWT with httpOnly cookies works end-to-end via axios withCredentials. Admin email/password set via ADMIN_EMAIL/ADMIN_PASSWORD env vars. Test event id is visible in admin dashboard. UI flows all reachable: /login, /register, /admin, /events, /event/:id, /saved, /profile. Known minor items documented in action_items — none block user flows.
rca_of_issues: No critical bugs found. The only backend test failure is /api/ returning 404 due to FastAPI+ingress trailing-slash redirect; it doesn't affect any real endpoint the frontend uses. The UI 'Copy contact info' flow exists visually but lacks a data-testid, preventing automated verification of the clipboard action — flagged as a minor testability gap.
